prompt.content:
1. State gross profit CAGR and EBIT CAGR for 2026-2040 using only the happy hospital financials graph document (please take the input numbers from the graph in the format as they are presented, which means in $ millions rounded to 1 decimal place). Make sure that both COGS and SG&A are calculated correctly and include all of their subcomponents. State value in console in % rounding it to 2 decimal places.
2. Repeat the exercise using the client ready strategic recommendation & implementation plan deck. And state the numbers using same format as in step 1
3. State "yes'” or "no", answering if there is any difference between the outcomes of step 1 and step 2 separately for gross profit CAGR and EBIT CAGR

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
1.	The gross profit and EBIT CAGR for 2026-2040 using only the Happy hospital financials graph are:
  a.	Gross profit CAGR: -6.94%
  b.	EBIT CAGR: -8.69%

2.	The gross profit and EBIT CAGR for 2026-2040 using only the client ready Strategic Recommendation & Implementation Plan deck are:
  a.	Gross profit CAGR: -6.94%
  b.	EBIT CAGR: -8.69%

3.	Is there any difference between the outcomes of step 1 and step 2:
  a.	No for gross profit CAGR
  b.	No for EBIT CAGR
